content: Comparative evaluations of intrinsic curiosity methods (ICM vs RND vs hand-designed curious agents) can be reframed as an active learning problem for neural architecture search of episodic memory-enabled curiosity autonomous agents in 2025, where the agent’s own curiosity drives selection of the most robust intrinsic reward mechanism for its target task. Instead of fixing a curiosity mechanism during agent design, the agent itself can use ICM’s intrinsic reward signal to actively explore different combinations of curiosity methods and memory architectures, self-optimizing for open-ended tasks.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
